ddls:
CREATE TABLE "flights" (
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight */,
  "flight_name" TEXT /* Name of the flight */,
  "flight_type" TEXT /* Type of flight (e.g., wind tunnel, flight test) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the flight */,
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* ID of the aircraft used in the flight */,
  "pilot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pilot who flew the aircraft */,
  "flight_plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight plan */,
  "sensor_config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor configuration */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the flight */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the flight was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who updated the flight */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the flight was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_sensor_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_config_id") REFERENCES sensor_configurations ("sensor_config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_flight_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_plan_id") REFERENCES flight_plans ("flight_plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_aircraft_id FOREIGN KEY ("aircraft_id") REFERENCES aircraft ("aircraft_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_pilot_id FOREIGN KEY ("pilot_id") REFERENCES pilots ("pilot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aircraft" (
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aircraft */,
  "aircraft_name" TEXT /* Name of the aircraft */,
  "aircraft_type" TEXT /* Type of aircraft */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the aircraft */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the aircraft */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the aircraft */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aircraft_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pilots" (
  "pilot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pilot */,
  "pilot_name" TEXT /* Name of the pilot */,
  "pilot_license" TEXT /* Pilot's license number */,
  "experience_hours" INTEGER /* Total hours of flying experience */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Certifications held by the pilot */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pilot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the sensor */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight the data belongs to */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that collected the data */,
  "data_value" REAL /* Value of the data point */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was collected */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the data point */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data point was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who updated the data point */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data point was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_data_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_data_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_data_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "atmospheric_pressure" (
  "pressure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pressure data point */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point the pressure data belongs to */,
  "pressure_value" REAL /* Value of the atmospheric pressure */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the pressure data point */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the pressure data point was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who updated the pressure data point */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the pressure data point was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pressure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_atmospheric_pressure_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES flight_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "atmospheric_temperature" (
  "temperature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each temperature data point */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point the temperature data belongs to */,
  "temperature_value" REAL /* Value of the atmospheric temperature */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the temperature data point */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the temperature data point was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who updated the temperature data point */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the temperature data point was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("temperature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_atmospheric_temperature_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES flight_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "airspeed" (
  "airspeed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each airspeed data point */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point the airspeed data belongs to */,
  "airspeed_value" REAL /* Value of the airspeed */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the airspeed data point */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the airspeed data point was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who updated the airspeed data point */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the airspeed data point was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airspeed_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_airspeed_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES flight_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pitot_dynamic_pressure" (
  "pitot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pitot data point */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point the pitot data belongs to */,
  "pitot_value" REAL /* Value of the pitot dynamic pressure */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the pitot data point */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the pitot data point was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who updated the pitot data point */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the pitot data point was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pitot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pitot_dynamic_pressure_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES flight_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scanivalve_pressures" (
  "scanivalve_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scanivalve data point */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point the scanivalve data belongs to */,
  "scanivalve_value" REAL /* Value of the scanivalve pressure */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the scanivalve data point */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the scanivalve data point was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who updated the scanivalve data point */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the scanivalve data point was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scanivalve_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scanivalve_pressures_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES flight_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "angle_of_attack" (
  "angle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each angle data point */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point the angle data belongs to */,
  "angle_value" REAL /* Value of the angle of attack */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the angle data point */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the angle data point was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who updated the angle data point */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the angle data point was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("angle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_angle_of_attack_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES flight_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sting_forces" (
  "sting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sting data point */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point the sting data belongs to */,
  "sting_value" REAL /* Value of the sting force */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the sting data point */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sting data point was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who updated the sting data point */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sting data point was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sting_forces_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES flight_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_plans" (
  "flight_plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight plan */,
  "flight_plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the flight plan */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the flight plan */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the flight plan */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the flight plan was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who updated the flight plan */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the flight plan was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_configurations" (
  "sensor_config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor configuration */,
  "sensor_config_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor configuration */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor configuration */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the sensor configuration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sensor configuration was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who updated the sensor configuration */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sensor configuration was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who updated the version */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES flight_data ("data_id")
)
